footer.tagline: B2B IoT subcontracting marketplace: enterprises outsource firmware, hardware and cloud to qualified startups in Southeast Asia.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Iotplace — B2B IoT subcontracting. All rights reserved.

home.audiences_sub: Structured B2B IoT subcontracting for enterprises and startups.
home.enterprise_card_text: Publish a firmware, hardware or cloud need and subcontract to qualified startups in Vietnam, Indonesia and Southeast Asia.
home.startup_card_text: Access subcontracting projects from large enterprises and apply to missions that match your skills.
home.how_sub: A simple, secure and transparent IoT subcontracting model.
home.step1_text: Large companies describe their IoT project: firmware, hardware, cloud, integration.
home.step2_text: Our platform identifies qualified startups in Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand and beyond.
home.step3_text: Contracts, project tracking, secure payments. The enterprise stays in control, the startup delivers.
home.featured_startups_sub: Agile, expert IoT teams ready to be subcontracted.
home.no_startups: No startups yet. Check back soon or {link}.
home.featured_projects_sub: Subcontracting opportunities published by large enterprises.
home.cta_title: Ready to connect your IoT ecosystem?
home.cta_sub: Join Iotplace and access a network of IoT talent in Southeast Asia.
home.faq_title: FAQ — IoT subcontracting for enterprises & startups

enterprises.seo_intro: Looking to outsource an IoT project? Iotplace connects you with startups skilled in firmware, PCB, cloud and hardware integration across Southeast Asia.
enterprises.benefit_speed_text: Agile teams that deliver in weeks, not months.
enterprises.benefit_cost_text: Competitive rates compared to Western in-house teams.
enterprises.benefit_security_text: Contracts, NDAs, quality tracking and integrated escrow payments.
enterprises.benefit_matching_text: Find the right startup based on skills and budget.

startups.country_sub: IoT startups in {country}: apply to subcontracting projects published by enterprises on Iotplace.
startups.seo_intro: Are you an IoT startup looking for subcontracting missions? Browse open projects and sign up to apply for firmware, hardware and cloud needs from large enterprises.
startups.no_country: No startups found for this country.
startups.cta_title: Are you an IoT startup in Asia?
startups.cta_sub: Sign up on Iotplace and access subcontracting projects from large enterprises.

projects.seo_intro: List of open IoT subcontracting projects: startups, browse missions and apply. Enterprises, publish your need.

model_enterprise_items: Define budget, timeline and required skills
Track progress via the Iotplace dashboard
model_startup_items: Create a profile with IoT skills
Deliver and get paid through our escrow system
about.why_sea_text: Vietnam, Indonesia, Thailand and the Philippines form a booming IoT hub: skilled engineers, competitive costs, favorable time zones, and a hardware innovation culture inherited from consumer electronics. Iotplace showcases this talent to global enterprises.

advisor.subtitle: Your guide to IoT subcontracting on the platform
advisor.welcome_enterprise: Hello! I'm your Iotplace guide. Tell me about your IoT outsourcing needs — firmware, hardware, cloud — and I'll point you to the right startups and projects.
advisor.welcome_startup: Hello! I'm your Iotplace guide. Ask me about open IoT missions, how to apply, or which skills are in demand from enterprises.
